research.title: Anthropic Acquired Bun — What This Means for Claude Code, JS Tooling, and Your Stack in 2026
research.whyTrending: December 2025 acquisition. Bun now core infrastructure for Claude Code. Still MIT/open-source, but corporate alignment with the leading AI coding tool changes the calculus for Node.js teams. Bun 1.3 at ~98% npm compat, 2–3.5x HTTP throughput, 4–10x faster cold starts, 20–40x faster installs. The strategic angle nobody else is writing.
